org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.netty4

类 NettyServer

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.AbstractPeer
      • org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.AbstractEndpoint
        • org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.AbstractServer
          • org.apache.dubbo.remoting.transport.netty4.NettyServer
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    Resetable, ChannelHandler, Endpoint, IdleSensible, RemotingServer

    public class NettyServer
extends AbstractServer
implements RemotingServer
    NettyServer.

    • 构造器概要

      构造器和说明

      • getChannels

        public Channel getChannel(InetSocketAddress remoteAddress)
        从接口复制的说明: RemotingServer
        get channel.

        getChannel 在接口中 RemotingServer
        返回:
        channel

      • canHandleIdle

        public boolean canHandleIdle()
        从接口复制的说明: IdleSensible
        Whether the implementation can sense and handle the idle connection. By default it's false, the implementation relies on dedicated timer to take care of idle connection.
        指定者:
        canHandleIdle 在接口中 IdleSensible
        返回:
        whether has the ability to handle idle connection

      • isBound

        public boolean isBound()
        从接口复制的说明: RemotingServer
        is bound.
        指定者:
        isBound 在接口中 RemotingServer
        返回:
        bound
